A once-in-a-generation opportunity?
Luxon and Freire on the New Zealand-India free trade agreement.

A kd-dialogues audio round from The Kiwi Dialectic.
Cast: Luxon, Freire.

Chapters:
00:00 — cold open
00:34 — I. Diagnosis · act intro i  diagnosis
00:42 — I. Diagnosis · luxon 01
01:33 — I. Diagnosis · freire 02
02:37 — II. Disagreement · act intro ii  disagreement
02:42 — II. Disagreement · luxon 01
03:21 — II. Disagreement · freire 02
04:26 — III. Proposal · act intro iii  proposal
04:32 — III. Proposal · luxon 01
05:11 — III. Proposal · freire 02
06:12 — end card
